# BashSnippets

> Free bash script examples for Linux, DevOps, and sysadmin automation. Copy-paste ready scripts with plain-English explanations. Written by Anguishe — a Linux self-taught user who built this site after learning bash from scratch.

## Author

Anguishe — Linux user, bash scripter. Tested every script personally on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and macOS Ventura. Contact: Anguisheh1@gmail.com

## What This Site Contains

- 17 ready-to-run bash scripts in /snippets/ — each with step-by-step explanation, variations, common mistakes, and FAQ
- Interactive Script Builder tool at /tools/ that generates custom bash scripts
- Bash Boilerplate Generator tool
- Beginner FAQ section covering the most common bash questions

## Script Categories

- Automation & File Management: backup scripts, file renaming, log cleanup, dated folders, duplicate file detection
- Monitoring & Alerts: disk space, CPU/RAM, website uptime, service watchdog
- Database: MySQL backup with retention
- Process Management: kill by name, service restart
- Best Practices: error handling templates (set -euo pipefail), safe script boilerplate
- Search & Text: grep patterns, file content search

## All Snippet Pages

- [Automated File Backup](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/automated-file-backup) — cp -r with timestamps and cron scheduling
- [Disk Space Warning](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/disk-space-warning) — df threshold check with cron
- [Delete Old Log Files](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/delete-old-log-files) — find -mtime -delete with retention control
- [Quick System Info Report](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/quick-system-info-report) — hostname, uptime, RAM, disk, IP in one command
- [Search Files for Text (grep)](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/search-files-for-text-grep) — recursive grep with filename and line number
- [Bash Error Handling](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/bash-error-handling) — set -euo pipefail template
- [MySQL Database Backup](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/mysql-database-backup) — mysqldump with gzip and 7-day retention
- [Check If Website Is Up](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/check-if-website-is-up) — curl HTTP status check for cron monitoring
- [Monitor CPU and RAM Usage](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/monitor-cpu-ram-usage) — top + free threshold alerts
- [Restart Service If Stopped](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/restart-service-if-stopped) — systemctl watchdog pattern
- [Kill a Process](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/kill-a-process) — pgrep preview then pkill with confirmation
- [Create Dated Work Folder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/create-dated-folder) — mkdir with date variable
- [Bash If Else — Complete Examples for Beginners](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/bash-if-else-examples) — if / elif / else syntax with practical examples — number comparison, string check, file exists
- [Send Email Alerts from Bash](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/bash-send-email-alert) — sends an email notification from a bash script using sendmail or msmtp
- [Linux File Permissions & Security](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/file-permissions-security) — chmod and chown patterns for setting correct file permissions on Linux
- [SSH Key Setup Script](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/ssh-key-setup-script) — generates an SSH key pair and appends the public key to authorized_keys
- [Find Duplicate Files in Linux](https://bashsnippets.xyz/snippets/find-duplicate-files) — md5sum + awk to find byte-for-byte duplicates across directories

## Interactive Tools

- [Bash Exit Code Lookup](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/bash-exit-code-lookup) — look up any exit code 0-255 and get the plain-English meaning and a copy-paste error handler
- [Cron Job Builder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/cron-job-builder) — visual cron expression builder with human-readable output and copy-paste crontab line
- [Chmod Permissions Builder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/chmod-permissions-builder) — permission matrix that outputs octal, symbolic, and chmod commands
- [Bash $PATH Debugger](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/path-debugger) — paste your $PATH, find duplicates and missing directories
- [Bash Boilerplate Generator](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/bash-boilerplate-generator) — generates production-ready .sh templates with error handling and logging
- [ShellCheck Error Decoder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/shellcheck-error-decoder) — paste a ShellCheck error code, get the plain-English explanation and a before/after fix

## Most important pages

- [Bash Exit Code Lookup](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/bash-exit-code-lookup): Interactive lookup for bash exit codes 0-255 with plain-English meanings and copy-paste error handlers.
- [Cron Job Builder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/cron-job-builder): Visual cron expression builder. Enter a schedule, get a crontab line.
- [Chmod Permissions Builder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/chmod-permissions-builder): Build chmod commands visually with a permission matrix showing octal and symbolic output.
- [ShellCheck Error Decoder](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/shellcheck-error-decoder): Paste a ShellCheck error code, get the plain-English explanation and a before/after fix.
- [Bash Boilerplate Generator](https://bashsnippets.xyz/tools/bash-boilerplate-generator): Generate a production-ready bash script template with error handling and argument parsing.
